question: How many days passed between the day I started watering my herb garden and the day I harvested my first batch of fresh herbs?
gold_answer: 24 days. 25 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.
reasoning_summary: User started watering herb garden on 2023-03-22 (source 61) and harvested first batch on 2023-04-15 (source 136). Difference is 24 days.
adaptive_choice_reason: same answer with stronger specialist support
